response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned the video (00:00-04:59). 2. Observed Raora Panthera and Nekomata Okayu throughout. 3. Content consists entirely of promotional discussion and merchandise showcase. 4. No vocal songs were identified. Only instrumental background music was present.
response.global_summary: A promotional birthday merchandise announcement featuring VTubers Raora Panthera and Nekomata Okayu.

scenes.description: Introductory conversation between Raora Panthera and Nekomata Okayu.
Okayu introduces an 'English Challenge' to Raora, involving conversational banter.
General announcement regarding the Raora Panthera birthday merchandise 2026.
Detailed review and showcase of individual merchandise items including the T-shirt, crossbody bag, plushie keychain, pouch, and bonus items.
